titlestmt.titleproper: Preliminary Guide to the Collection of Student Printing
titlestmt.author: Compiled by Colleen Reilly

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 8327268.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday September 1, 2020 at 23:02

did.abstract: This collection contains printed matter produced by students at various University Presses.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The Collection of Student Printing was housed in the former Arts of the Book Collection until its transfer to the Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library in 2008.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Collection of Student Printing, Robert B. Haas Family Arts Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This collection contains printed matter produced by students at various University Presses.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into four series: I. Wesleyan University Press, 1941-1974. II. Oxford Press, 1959-1973. III. Rhode Island School of Design Press, 1987. IV. Other University Presses, 1936-1980.

did.unittitle: The Celebrated Jumping Frog of Calaveras County
A Showing of Type and Ornament in the Art Laboratory
The McIntire Garden House on the Endicott Estate
Ancient Customs Used in a Printing House
Two Wood Engravings by Thomas Bewick
Did Bruno Wassertile Ever Make You Smile?
The Manner of Sir Philip Sidneyes Death
A Draught of Sir Philip Sidney's Arcadia
Rhode Island School of Design Press
An Account of the Hunting, Dressing, and Cooking of the Squirrel and Rabbit
